Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

YOS 20, 094 [Quitclaim for house and undeveloped lot][via hbtin]

Obverse
o 1o 1

mim-ma dib-bi ⸢DI⸣.[KU₅ u ra-ga-mu ša₂ mGAL-d60 A ša₂ md60-NUMUN-MU]

o 22

A mE₂.KUR-za-kir [a-na muḫ-ḫi ...]

o 33

u₃ a-na muḫ-[ḫi ...]

o 44

ša₂ qe₂-reb UNUGki [...]

o 55

US₂ KIu₂ tu₁₅⸢U₁₈⸣.[LU ...]

o 66

mE₂.KUR-za-kir SAG.⸢KI⸣ [AN.TA ...]

o 77

UN-MEŠ SAG.KI KI.TA ⸢tu₁₅⸣[KUR.RA ...]

o 88

it-ti md60-NUMUN-MU A ša₂ m[la-ba-ši A mE₂.KUR-za-kir a-na]

o 99

u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₂ ia-a-nu ul i-[šal-laṭ-ma mGAL-d60 A ša₂]

o 1010

md60-NUMUN-MU A mE₂.KUR-za-kir zu-u₂-⸢ku⸣ [...]

o 1111

MU-MEŠ u₃ E₂ u₃ ki-šub-ba-a MU-MEŠ a-na [...]

o 1212

a-na nu-dun-nu-u₂ a-na e-piš ṣu-bu-tu₂ ⸢u₃⸣ [...]

o 1313

ša₂-nam-ma gab-bi e-lat md60-NUMUN-MU A ša₂ mla-⸢ba⸣-[ši A mE₂.KUR-za-kir]

o 1414

ul id-din u₃ ul i-nam-din u₃ ⸢ki⸣-[i ...]

o 1515

it-tan-nu u₂-mar-raq a-di ⸢12-TA-AM₃⸣ [... md60-NUMUN-MU]

o 1616

A ša₂ mla-ba-ši A mE₂.KUR-za-⸢kir a⸣-[na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₂ ...]

o 1717

[...]-⸢x⸣ ša₂ ⸢E₂ u₃ ki-šub⸣-[ba-a MU-MEŠ ...]

Reverse
r 1r 1

u₃ E₂ u₃ ki-šub-ba-a MU-MEŠ ša₂ md60-NUMUN-MU A ša₂ mla-ba-[ši]

r 22

A mE₂.KUR-za-kir a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₂ šu₂-nu

uninscribed line
(witnesses)
r 33

lu₂mu-kin₇ mina-qi₂-bit-d60 A ša₂ mdUTU-MU A mḫun-zu-u₂

r 44

mdUTU-SUR A ša₂ mBARA₂-d60 A mlu-uš-tam-mar-dIŠKUR

r 55

mni-din-tu₄-d60 u₃ md60-AD-GUR A-MEŠ ša₂ mša₂-d60-iš-šu-u₂ A-MEŠ mḫun-zu-u₂

r 66

md60-GI A ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-MEŠ-MU A mŠU-d60

r 77

m liGIŠ A ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 A mŠU-d60

r 88

mdINANA-NUMUN-DU₃ A ša₂ md60-AD-GUR A mlu-uš-tam-mar-dIŠKUR

r 99

md60-DINiṭ A ša₂ mri-ḫat-d60 A mlu-uš-tam-mar-d⸢IŠKUR⸣

r 1010

mša₂-d60-iš-šu-u₂ A ša₂ mdINANA-MU-KAM₂ A mḫun-zu-⸢u₂⸣

r 1111

md60-AD-URI₃ A ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 A mḫun-zu-[u₂]

r 1212

md60-GI A ša₂ mba-la-ṭu A mlu-uš-⸢tam⸣-[mar-dIŠKUR]

r 1313

mina-qi₂-bit-d60 A ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU A mḫun-[zu-u₂]
